ac_uid_algorithm: sha256(type + given + when + then + json.dumps(check, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':'), ensure_ascii=False))[:16]

items.when: Each file is read and its test function body is inspected
items.then: Zero test files contain bare 'pass' as the sole body statement; zero contain 'TEST_INCOMPLETE:' sentinel; each test function contains at least one assert statement or pytest assertion
Detection logic states CJK detection (U+4E00-U+9FFF) runs unconditionally in scoped files; exemption clauses suppress reporting only, not detection

items.given: agents/ba.md Quality Standards checklist is read
items.then: A checklist item exists verifying complexity_tier and risk_level fields are populated AND that the test-writer trigger gate (complexity_tier >= STANDARD OR risk_level == high) is correctly evaluated
Function unions git diff --name-only with git ls-files --others --exclude-standard, deduplicates, and applies in_scope filtering to both sources
The trigger explicitly checks complexity_tier >= STANDARD OR risk_level == high, mirroring the dispatch gate in commands/dev.md Step 8

items.given: scripts/canary-verify.sh verify_write_guard and verify_git_privilege_guard functions are read
items.when: The negative-payload test logic is inspected
items.then: Each function contains a deny-payload test with a payload the hook MUST block AND asserts rc == 2, matching the pattern in verify_bash_safety

items.given: hooks/doc_sync/regen_readme.py SKIP_NAMES and hooks/doc_sync/tree.py SKIP_FILES are read
items.then: Both files contain suppression logic for filenames matching cp-state-* and spec-2026*-* patterns (either via startswith checks or equivalent prefix filtering)
The list contains a prefix matching blast-radius-map.json writes (e.g., '*/.claude/dev-registry/*/blast-radius-map' or equivalent glob)

items.when: All echo and printf calls are inspected
items.then: Every output statement redirects to stderr (>&2); zero bare stdout output statements remain

items.when: The location-complaint overlap procedure is inspected
items.then: The mechanical tokenize + set-intersection + Jaccard + domain-token table has been replaced with an LLM-judgment instruction; no Jaccard threshold or domain-token table remains
